name: Chicken Thighs Marengo
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the chicken thighs.
2. Rinse the chicken with cold water and pat dry.
3. Place the chicken in a shallow container. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray; add olive oil. Place over medium-high heat until hot.
5. Add chicken to the skillet; cook 2-3 minutes on each side until lightly browned. Remove chicken from skillet, and drain on paper towels. Wipe skillet dry with a paper towel.
6. Recoat skillet with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot.
7. Add mushrooms and cook 2 minutes, stirring frequently. Remove mushrooms from skillet, and set aside.
8. Recoat skillet with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot.
9. Add green onions and garlic; sauté 1 minute.
10. Stir in wine and thyme. Add reserved chicken. Bring mixture to a boil.
11. Cover; reduce heat, and simmer 25 minutes.
12. Add reserved mushrooms and tomato wedges; simmer 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
13. Sprinkle with parsley, and serve immediately.
